# PETSTORE GET /user/logout

## Method
- `GET`

## Path
- `/user/logout`

## Summary
Logs out current logged in user session.

## Parameters
- none

## Auth
- not specified

## Error Model
- no explicit error model

## Examples
- no explicit examples
